title: Crotalaria mariae-antoniae
taxonomy: Crotalaria mariae-antoniae is classified in the kingdom Plantae. It belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. The genus Crotalaria is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Within the Fabaceae family, Crotalaria mariae-antoniae is further classified as a species of the subfamily Faboideae. Crotalaria mariae-antoniae is a part of the order Fabales.

intro: Crotalaria mariae-antoniae, also known as Maria Antonia's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Crotalaria mariae-antoniae include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic potential.
